commands.review_summary:
The branch changes SSRF pinned DNS lookup selection to keep automatic dual-stack lookups on IPv4, classifies `EADDRNOTAVAIL` as transient/benign, adds regression coverage and changelog text, and refreshes one Swift gateway protocol model field.

Reproducibility: yes. source-level reproduction is high confidence: the linked report gives a concrete WSL2/no-IPv6-route path, and current main source shows pinned automatic lookups can rotate from IPv4 to IPv6 while `EADDRNOTAVAIL` is not benign. I did not run the live WSL2 gateway scenario in this read-only pass.
commands.review_followup: No automated repair is needed; this protected, network-security-adjacent PR appears source-correct and proof-sufficient, so the next action is maintainer review, CI validation, and landing judgment.
